title: Hollyone 6PCS 30'' Gold Palm Leaves, Large Artificial Leaves Tropical Fake Palm Leaf Stems, Decorative Faux Plants for Jungle Party, Wedding Decorations, Floral Arrangements, Home Decor
features: These artificial gold palm leaves beautifully mimic the shape and texture of natural palm fronds. Each pack includes 6 dense palm stems, offering endless decorative possibilities.

Whether adding exotic flair to an Asian-themed table arrangement or mounting the fronds on the wall, these golden palm leaves bring a warm and luxurious touch to any space. They also look stunning on a dresser or as part of a striking table centerpiece.
The narrow, paired leaves are available in lengths of 48cm/19'' or 76cm/30''. With a flexible wire inside the stems, you can easily bend and shape them to fit your design needs.

These lifelike palm leaves are perfect for creating floral or plant arrangements in various styles. Not only are they incredibly realistic, but they’re also low-maintenance, offering long-lasting beauty for any setting!

Golden palm leaves are versatile for seasonal arrangements, both indoor and outdoor decorations, and for various celebrations like weddings, jungle parties, birthdays, home decor, and living room adornments.
